creator: robbelics@gmail.com
text:
I upgraded chromium to version 43.0.2357.132 (64-bit) today on amd64, FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE and now I'm unable to upload files to Google Drive through the browser in my Google account. Here are the last several print outs in the terminal:

[96829:419460096:0712/181241:ERROR:resource_request_policy.cc(57)] Denying load of chrome-extension://apdfllckaahabafndbhieahigkjlhalf/page_embed_script.js from hosted app.
libpng warning: iCCP: known incorrect sRGB profile
[96829:419460096:0712/181246:ERROR:resource_request_policy.cc(57)] Denying load of chrome-extension://apdfllckaahabafndbhieahigkjlhalf/page_embed_script.js from hosted app.
[98000:419460096:0712/181301:ERROR:resource_request_policy.cc(57)] Denying load of chrome-extension://apdfllckaahabafndbhieahigkjlhalf/page_embed_script.js from hosted app.
libpng warning: iCCP: known incorrect sRGB profile
[98000:419460096:0712/181305:ERROR:resource_request_policy.cc(57)] Denying load of chrome-extension://apdfllckaahabafndbhieahigkjlhalf/page_embed_script.js from hosted app.
